message:
perf(style): Add LRU cache for Style.render_ansi()

- Add ANSI_CACHE static with 256-entry LRU cache
- Cache key is (Style, ColorSystem) tuple
- Fast-path for null styles bypasses cache lookup
- Refactor render_ansi() to use cached path
- Add render_ansi_uncached() for internal logic
- Add tests: test_style_render_ansi_caching,
  test_style_render_ansi_caching_different_styles

Closes: rich_rust-1ht

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
